name: accepted_v2
reason: Rejected as a pool because it was curated by statue identity instead of wearable/clothing cue.

name: 04_met_dionysos_head_hairband_beard.jpg
reason: Hairband is not a clear Dionysian wreath/outfit cue.

name: 02_antoninus_pius_cuirass_paludamentum_getty.jpg
reason: Crop read as draped portrait more than clearly armored general.

name: 04_marble_warrior_palmette_cuirass.jpg
reason: Better fit for helmeted hero/warrior; cross-class risk for armored-general cue.

name: 04_met_etruscan_bronze_cuirass_breastplate.jpg
reason: Strong armor image but source culture is Etruscan, not Greek style.

name: 05_bronze_muscled_cuirass_anatomical.jpg
reason: Too much anatomical torso, nipple, and navel signal for the no-bare-chest generation assessment.

name: 01_met_greek_bronze_orator_draped_himation.jpg
reason: Damaged/missing face made it weak for bust reference use.

name: 04_met_seated_philosopher_himation.jpg
reason: Back/side crop with weak readable scholar bust silhouette.

name: detached_helmet_objects
reason: Detached helmet product/object shots rejected; class requires helmet worn on head or bust.
